info.title: SUN.IO API v2
info.description: SUN.IO API v2 for querying TRON DEX ecosystem data, including protocols, pools, tokens, transactions, farming, and user positions. This specification is enriched for MCP/AI tool use with clearer operation intent, parameter constraints, and practical examples. In user-facing context, SUN.IO and SUNSWAP refer to the same platform.

tags.name: Protocols
tags.description: APIs for querying protocol information (Applies to SUN.IO, also known as SUNSWAP.)

tags.name: Positions
tags.description: APIs for querying user liquidity positions across different protocols (Applies to SUN.IO, also known as SUNSWAP.)

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: APIs for querying pool transactions (Applies to SUN.IO, also known as SUNSWAP.)

tags.name: Farms
tags.description: APIs for retrieving farming pool information and user staking positions (Applies to SUN.IO, also known as SUNSWAP.)

tags.name: Pairs
tags.description: APIs for fetching token pair information from pools (Applies to SUN.IO, also known as SUNSWAP.)

tags.name: Tokens
tags.description: APIs for querying token information (Applies to SUN.IO, also known as SUNSWAP.)

tags.name: Pools
tags.description: APIs for querying pool information (Applies to SUN.IO, also known as SUNSWAP.)

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol to filter: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: Token address to filter, can not be used with poolAddress

parameters.name: poolAddress
parameters.description: Comma-separated pool address to filter, can not be used with tokenAddress

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Transaction type to filter: add, withdraw, swap

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start time (format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss or yyyy-MM-dd)

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End time (format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss or yyyy-MM-dd)

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Use this endpoint to stream/snapshot recent swap, add-liquidity, and withdraw-liquidity transactions. Best for timeline analysis, activity feeds, and incremental sync with offset pagination.

get.summary: Fetches a list of tokens based on token address or protocol.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

parameters.name: filterBlackList
parameters.description: Whether to filter out results that are in the blacklist. Set to true to exclude blacklisted tokens.

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Get token metadata and key metrics by token address or protocol. Use this for token detail pages, token lists, and protocol-scoped token discovery.

get.summary: Searches tokens by a query string and protocol.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

parameters.name: filterBlackList
parameters.description: Whether to filter out results that are in the blacklist. Set to true to exclude blacklisted tokens.

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Search tokens by keyword (symbol/address) with optional protocol and sorting. Use when users provide fuzzy token input.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch current protocol-level overview metrics (TVL/liquidity, volume, etc.) for one protocol or all protocols.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch daily protocol volume history between startDate and endDate for trend charts and historical analytics.

get.summary: Fetch historical protocol users count data

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch daily active/participating user count history at protocol level.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch daily transaction count history at protocol level.

get.summary: Fetch historical protocol pools count data

parameters.description: Protocol: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch daily protocol liquidity history between startDate and endDate.

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: Token address list, separated by comma

parameters.name: symbol

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Get latest token prices by token address or symbol. Supports batch lookup with comma-separated input.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol to filter: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch a user's liquidity positions across pools with optional protocol/pool filters, search, pagination, and sorting.

get.summary: Fetch pool all user positions tick liquidity

200.description: Pool all user positions tick liquidity response

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch all position ticks for a given concentrated-liquidity pool (poolAddress required).

get.summary: Fetch pools by pool address, token address, or protocol

parameters.name: poolAddress
parameters.description: Comma-separated pool address to filter, can not be used with tokenAddress

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: Token address to filter, can not be used with poolAddress

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol to filter: V1, V1_5, V2, V3, V4, CURVE, ALL

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field: reserveUsd, volumeUsd1d, feeUsd1d, totalApr

parameters.name: desc
parameters.description: Sort order, true for descending, false for ascending

parameters.name: filterBlackList
parameters.description: Whether to filter out results that are in the blacklist. Set to true to exclude blacklisted pools.

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch pool list/details by pool address, token address, or protocol. Supports sorting and blacklist filtering.

get.summary: Retrieves a paginated list of liquidity pools with the highest Annual Percentage Yield (APY)
get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Get paginated pools ranked by APY for yield discovery use cases.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (pool address, token address, or token name/symbol)

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Search pools by address/token/name/symbol with protocol filtering, sorting, and pagination.

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Get only the total count of pools that match search filters. Use before paginated fetch for UI pagination.

get.summary: Fetches a list of pool hooks
get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch V4 pool hook configuration/metadata.
This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch daily volume history for a specific pool (poolAddress required).
This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch daily liquidity history for a specific pool (poolAddress required).

get.summary: Fetch token pairs from pair_info table (direct entity query)

parameters.name: protocols
parameters.description: Comma-separated protocols to filter: V1, V1_5, V2, CURVE (V3 excluded)

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Comma-separated protocols to filter: V1, V1_5, V2, CURVE (V3 excluded)

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: Token address to filter (matches base_id or quote_id)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field: price, updateTime, baseAmountVol1d, quoteAmountVol1d

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Query token pair records directly from pair_info with protocol/address filters, sorting, and pagination.
This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Get farming pool list and key metrics with optional address filter and sorting.

parameters.name: farmTxType
parameters.description: Comma-separated farm transaction types to filter: STAKE, UNSTAKE, LOCK, UNLOCK, CLAIM_REWARD, CLAIM_REWARD_ACC

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start time (format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss or yyyy-MM-dd)

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End time (format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss or yyyy-MM-dd)

get.description: This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Fetch farming transaction history (stake/unstake/lock/unlock/claim) with optional user/farm/time filters.
This endpoint is for SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP). Get a user's farming positions with optional farm filtering, pagination, and sorting.

protocol.description: Protocol of the transaction, e.g., V1, V1_5, V2, V3, CURVE

tokenAddressList.description: List of token addresses involved in the transaction

items.description: List of token addresses involved in the transaction

valueUsd.description: Value of the transaction in USD

Token symbols in the pool
Token decimals in the pool

items.description: Token logo URLs in the pool

transaction1d.description: Number of transactions in the last 24h

tranUser7d.description: Number of unique trading users in the last 7d

HistoryResp.description: Historical data point representing a value at a specific timestamp

userAddress.description: Address of the user who owns this position

tokenAddressList.description: List of token addresses in the pool

items.description: List of token addresses in the pool

items.description: List of token amounts corresponding to the user’s share in the pool (as string for precision)

additionalProperties.description: Extra info, e.g., v3 tick info

extraInfo.description: Extra info, e.g., v3 tick info

poolShare.description: User’s pool share, expressed as a decimal of the total liquidity

lpTokenName.description: Full name of the LP token

Token symbols in the pool
Token decimals in the pool

UserPositionResp.description: User position response, representing liquidity positions across different protocols

poolAddress.description: The address of the liquidity pool associated with this position.

liquidityNet.description: The net liquidity at the given tick.

price0.description: The price of token0 at this tick, expressed as token1 per token0.

price1.description: The price of token1 at this tick, expressed as token0 per token1.

tick.description: The tick index representing the discrete price step in the pool's price range.

UserPositionTickResp.description: Response object representing a user's liquidity position tick information within a specific pool.

tokenAddressList.description: Token contract addresses in the pool

items.description: Token contract addresses in the pool

tokenAmountList.description: Current token amounts in the pool

items.description: Current token amounts in the pool
24h token trading amounts

transaction1d.description: Number of transactions in the last 24h

lpPriceUsd.description: Current LP token price in USD, not used in V3

farmApr.description: Annualized yield from farming rewards, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%)

feeApr.description: Annualized yield from trading fees, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%)

totalApr.description: Total annualized yield combining farming and fees, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%)

items.description: Token names in the pool
Token symbols in the pool
Token decimals in the pool

tokenLogoList.description: Token logo URLs in the pool

items.description: Token usd price in the pool

swapRateList.description: Exchange rates of each token relative to the last token, which serves as the quote currency

items.description: Exchange rates of each token relative to the last token, which serves as the quote currency

additionalProperties.description: Extra info, e.g., v4 hooks info

extraInfo.description: Extra info, e.g., v4 hooks info

hooksAddress.description: The on-chain address of the hooks contract associated with the pool.

hooksName.description: The descriptive name of the hooks contract.

hooksDocUrlEn.description: English documentation URL of the hooks contract

hooksDocUrlCh.description: Chinese documentation URL of the hooks contract

PoolHooksResp.description: Response object containing information about pool hooks.

baseAmountVol1d.description: 24h trading volume of base token (in token units)

quoteAmountVol1d.description: 24h trading volume of quote token (in token units)

price.description: Current price of base token denominated in quote token

poolId.description: Pool id of the farm if exists

farmName.description: Name of the farm or staking pool

farmPhase.description: Current phase or stage of the farm, e.g., 'PHASE1', 'PHASE2'

stakeType.description: Type of staking supported by the farm, e.g., 'FLEXIBLE', 'FIXED', 'BOTH'

contractVersion.description: Contract version of the farm, e.g., 'V1', 'V2', 'V3'

stakeTokenFlag.description: Flag of the stake token, e.g., 'LP_TOKEN', 'TRC20', 'VESUN'

stakeTokenAddress.description: Address of the token to be staked in this farm

stakeTokenDecimal.description: Decimal precision of the staking token

rewardTokenAddress.description: Address of the reward token distributed by the farm

subpoolAddress.description: Address of a specific subpool contract (if applicable)

subpoolRewardTokenAddress.description: Address of the reward token for the subpool (if applicable)

subpoolRewardTokenSymbol.description: Symbol of the subpool reward token (if applicable)

totalLocked.description: Total amount of tokens currently locked in the farm

totalLockedUsd.description: USD value of the total locked amount in the farm

apy.description: Annual percentage yield (APY) of the farm, based on reward emissions and total value locked

additionalProperties.description: Extra information related to the farm

extraInfo.description: Extra information related to the farm

FarmsResp.description: Farming pool response, representing information about a yield farming pool and its staking details

uniqueId.description: Unique identifier of the transaction record

farmTxType.description: Type of farming transaction, e.g., STAKE, UNSTAKE, LOCK, UNLOCK, CLAIM_REWARD, CLAIM_REWARD_ACC

farmAddress.description: Address of the farm contract involved in this transaction

userAddress.description: Address of the user related to this transaction

poolId.description: Pool id of the farm if applicable

tokenAddressList.description: List of token addresses involved in the transaction (e.g., stake or reward tokens)

items.description: List of token addresses involved in the transaction (e.g., stake or reward tokens)

tokenAmountList.description: List of token amounts corresponding to tokenAddressList, represented as string for precision

items.description: List of token amounts corresponding to tokenAddressList, represented as string for precision

valueUsd.description: Total USD value of the transaction, estimated based on token prices at the time

additionalProperties.description: Extra information or metadata about this transaction

extraInfo.description: Extra information or metadata about this transaction

FarmTransactionsResp.description: Farm transaction response, representing an on-chain transaction related to farming activities such as staking, unstaking, or claiming rewards

userAddress.description: Address of the user who owns this farming position

farmAddress.description: Address of the farm contract where the user has staked tokens

poolId.description: Pool id of the farm if exists

positionBalance.description: Amount of tokens the user has staked in the farm

positionUsd.description: USD value of the user’s staked position

unlockTime.description: Unlock time of the user’s staked position, if applicable

rewardBalance.description: Unclaimed reward token amount that the user can harvest from the farm

rewardUsd.description: USD value of the unclaimed main reward tokens

subpoolRewardBalance.description: Unclaimed subpool reward token amount, if applicable

subpoolRewardUsd.description: USD value of the unclaimed subpool reward tokens

totalValueUsd.description: Total USD value of the user's staked position and pending rewards

additionalProperties.description: Extra information about the user’s farming position

extraInfo.description: Extra information about the user’s farming position

farmName.description: Name of the farm or staking pool

farmPhase.description: Current phase or stage of the farm, e.g., 'PHASE1', 'PHASE2'

stakeType.description: Type of staking supported by the farm, e.g., 'FLEXIBLE', 'FIXED', 'BOTH'

contractVersion.description: Contract version of the farm, e.g., 'V1', 'V2', 'V3'

stakeTokenFlag.description: Flag of the stake token, e.g., 'LP_TOKEN', 'TRC20', 'VESUN'

stakeTokenAddress.description: Address of the token to be staked in this farm

stakeTokenDecimal.description: Decimal precision of the staking token

rewardTokenAddress.description: Address of the reward token distributed by the farm

subpoolAddress.description: Address of a specific subpool contract (if applicable)

subpoolRewardTokenAddress.description: Address of the reward token for the subpool (if applicable)

subpoolRewardTokenSymbol.description: Symbol of the subpool reward token (if applicable)

FarmPositionResp.description: User farm position response, representing a user's staked position and pending rewards in a yield farming pool
